data.title: D6 Inc. acquires Richmond, IL extrusion facility from Good Natured Products, expanding its manufacturing footprint.
data.description: In Dallas today, D6 Inc. shared news of its acquisition of the extrusion facility in Richmond, Illinois, from Good Natured Products and associated entities. This move signifies D6's advancement in sustainable food-grade packaging with high PCR content. The transaction, conducted entirely in cash, aims to enhance D6's manufacturing presence within the country and bolster its commitment to a closed-loop operational approach. The acquired facility spans around 75,000 square feet, solidifying the company's position in the market. This strategic expansion showcases D6's dedication to growth and sustainability.

data.title: HaloMD adds three executive leaders to strengthen data, tech, compliance ops. Rural practices face financial pressures.
data.description: HaloMD, based in Addison, Texas, revealed on December 4, 2025, that three seasoned executive professionals have joined their team to bolster expertise in data, technology, and legal operations. This move comes at a critical time as financial challenges escalate for rural hospitals and independent practices in the healthcare sector. The new additions highlight the company's commitment to addressing pressing industry needs and ensuring comprehensive support for healthcare providers during these trying times.

data.title: MySmile launches "New Year, New Smile" campaign, encouraging upgrading oral care routine. #LA #Dec4425 #PRNewswire
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Los Angeles, a renowned company, MySmile, known for its at-home teeth whitening products and advanced oral care solutions, is starting off the year with a strong proclamation: "New Year, New Me, New Smile." Encouraging individuals to seize the opportunity for new beginnings, the brand is initiating a campaign aimed at promoting personal reinvention through improved oral health practices.

data.title: FIU researchers' discovery could revolutionize death investigations by aiding in estimating time of death using blow fly larvae.
data.description: In Miami on December 4, 2025, researchers at FIU made a significant breakthrough that may aid forensic investigators in better estimating the time of death. Typically, death investigations depend on maggots, which are the larvae of blow flies and one of the initial insects to infest a body post-mortem. This discovery could revolutionize the current methods used in estimating time of death by providing more accurate and reliable data to investigators.

data.title: Project "Relatos del Terruño" in Sinaloa aims to expand with new partners to share traditional and indigenous stories.
data.description: In Los Mochis, Mexico, Pacifico Mexinol is looking to expand its traditional and indigenous stories pilot program "Relatos del Terruño" by collaborating with new partners and incorporating additional voices. The program aims to amplify these stories and promote cultural heritage.

data.title: SEC approves a 2x leveraged ETF linked to SUI as crypto's leverage wipeout heightens concerns about market volatility.
data.description: Regulators have issued a warning regarding the amplification of volatility in crypto markets due to excessive leverage, as the SEC has recently given approval for a 2x leveraged ETF linked to SUI.

data.title: Stocks rise as small caps lead; Nasdaq edges up, Dollar General and AppLovin break out. Surprise jobless claims.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw small caps driving gains, while the Nasdaq showed a slight increase on Thursday after a surprising drop in weekly jobless claims. Companies such as Dollar General and AppLovin experienced significant growth. The market update highlighted the Nasdaq's marginal rise and the breakout of Dollar General, along with a bank approaching entry.

data.title: XRP falls 4%, ADA may rise 50%, XRP facing resistance at $2.17-$2.31. Support at $2, critical for avoiding breakdown.
data.description: XRP saw a 4% decrease, while Cardano is potentially in line for a 50% surge according to technical analysis. XRP is facing resistance at the $2.17 to $2.31 range, with continuous selling pressure hindering significant gains. Despite this setback, XRP is managing to hold onto the $2 support level, preventing a breakdown. This support level coincides with the 0.236 Fibonacci retracement and a rising trendline that has provided stability for XRP in recent weeks. If the $2 support is breached, potential downside targets include $1.98 and $1.81, which represents a critical level that could revert the chart back to a bearish trend from mid-November. The detailed report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fragmented CX hinders trust & engagement in organizations despite digital investments per Info-Tech Research Group.
data.description: Numerous companies continue to struggle with disconnected channel strategies, hindering customer engagement despite substantial investments in digital tools. The Info-Tech Research Group, a leading global research and advisory firm, has released the Omnichannel Playbook to address this issue. The playbook offers insights and strategies to enhance visibility and improve customer engagement across channels, aiming to help organizations better navigate the digital landscape. This resource serves as a comprehensive guide for businesses looking to optimize their omnichannel approach and unlock the potential of seamless customer experiences.
US MONEY-MARKET FUND ASSETS HIT RECORD $7.65 TRILLION — ICI
Adrienne Jones confirms she’s stepping down as Speaker of the House, effective immediately

SILVER SLID FROM RECORD HIGHS AS TRADERS BOOKED PROFITS AFTER AN OVERHEATED RALLY, WITH ING WARNING THE SURGE IS UNSUSTAINABLE EVEN AS STRONG INDUSTRIAL DEMAND AND TIGHT SUPPLY KEEP PRICES BROADLY SUPPORTED.

data.title: Teamsters from Local 210 will hand out flyers at Tony Robbins' event in Palm Beach, exposing lessons learned by SkyHop Global CEO.
data.description: Kristine Scotto, a graduate of Robbins and CEO of SkyHop Global, will be sharing insights gained from her experience. In West Palm Beach, Florida, on December 4, 2025, Skyhop Global drivers and members of Teamsters Local 210 will distribute informational flyers outside the Palm Beach County Convention Center.

data.title: Generational Group facilitates sale of American Coring & Supply, Inc. to a Private Investor on Oct 14, 2025. Based in NJ since 1991, company offers concrete modification services.
data.description: In Dallas, Generational Group, a top mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, recently facilitated the sale of American Coring & Supply, Inc. to a private investor. The deal was finalized on October 14, 2025. American Coring & Supply, Inc., headquartered in Toms River, New Jersey, has been a key player in the concrete modification industry since 1991. Their services encompass core drilling, cutting, patching, breaking, and general excavation for commercial construction projects.

data.title: Alpine Banks of Colorado to see retirement of directors Linda Childears and Steve Briggs in 2026.
data.description: In Glenwood Springs, Colorado, Alpine Banks of Colorado disclosed today the upcoming retirement of Linda Childears and Steve Briggs from their positions on the boards of directors of the Company and its wholly owned subsidiary, Alpine Bank. Childears and Briggs will remain in their roles until the conclusion of their terms, which is expected to be at the 2026 annual meetings of both entities.

data.title: PerfectQuote and Dominion National partner to expand group dental/vision offerings. Partnership announced on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: PerfectQuote, Inc., a prominent group health digital quoting and distribution platform based in Austin, Texas, revealed on December 4, 2025, its collaboration with Dominion National for offering their customers access to Dominion's tailored group dental and vision plans. This partnership aims to enhance PerfectQuote's services and provide more options for their customers. Dominion, renowned for its customizable dental and vision offerings, will now be available through PerfectQuote, expanding the choices available to their customers.

data.title: Peter Schiff could not verify a gold bar on stage with CZ in Dubai. They debated on gold vs Bitcoin as store of value.
data.description: During a recent event panel in Dubai, the gold proponent Peter Schiff engaged in a debate with Binance co-founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao. Schiff contended that tokenized gold serves as a superior store-of-value asset compared to Bitcoin.

data.title: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I extends deadline for business combination to Dec. 28, 2025; $500 deposited in Trust Account.
data.description: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (OTC: AIMTF) from Wilmington, Delaware, has extended its deadline for completing its initial business combination from November 28, 2025, to December 28, 2025. On November 28, 2025, I-Fa Chang, the manager of the sponsor of the Company, deposited $500 into its trust account as the "Monthly Extension Payment." The Company, a blank check entity incorporated in the Cayman Islands, made this move to ensure completion within the new timeframe.

data.title: Record-breaking $26.6 million raised by Rogers Charity Classic for Alberta children's charities.
data.description: The recent announcement from Rogers Charity Classic in Calgary, Alberta on December 4, 2025, revealed that the event has successfully raised an unprecedented $26.6 million. This substantial amount will be utilized to aid children's charities throughout Alberta.

data.title: New 'Alien' identity system ensures users are human using private decentralized app, without storing personal data.
data.description: A decentralized app developed by Alien ensures user privacy by verifying individuals without storing biometric data or government-issued IDs. This innovative approach offers a secure way for users to authenticate their identity without compromising sensitive information. The app has gained popularity among privacy-conscious individuals, with a user base exceeding 100,000 and growing rapidly. By leveraging advanced encryption techniques and blockchain technology, Alien's unique verification process has proven to be effective and reliable. This shift towards privacy-focused authentication methods marks a significant advancement in the digital landscape, catering to the increasing demand for secure and confidential user verification processes.
